pipeline.title: 用 like/enjoy/hate + doing 表达喜好
pipeline.chunk: like doing / enjoy doing / hate doing

items.answer: She enjoys cooking for her family.
I hate waiting in long lines.

items.zh: 比起开车我更喜欢走路。

items.answer: I practice speaking English every day.
I avoid eating late at night.
Can you imagine living in space?

pipeline.title: [subject] [verb] doing [noun] 动名词句式操练

items.answer: Do you mind opening the window?

pipeline.title: enjoy / hate / mind 一词多句

items.answer: Do you mind if I sit here?

pipeline.title: keen on / fond of / worth 一词多句

items.answer: I was fond of drawing as a child.
Are you fond of outdoor activities?

pipeline.title: avoid / consider / give up 一词多句

items.answer: I avoid eating late at night.
I gave up smoking last year.

pipeline.title: 从喜好到行动逐步扩展

levels.label: 加频率
levels.en: I like swimming. I practice swimming every week.
levels.zh: 我喜欢游泳。我每周练习游泳。

levels.label: 加推荐
levels.en: I like swimming. I practice every week. It's really worth trying!
levels.zh: 我喜欢游泳。每周练习。真的很值得一试！

pipeline.title: 用 want/hope/need + to do 表达意愿
pipeline.chunk: want to do / hope to / need to

items.answer: I need to buy some food.
I hope to see you again.
I would like to order now.
I want to learn to cook.
I long to see my family.

pipeline.title: I [verb] to [action] because [reason] 不定式操练

items.zh: 我想学中文因为我想去中国。
items.answer: I want to learn Chinese because I want to visit China.

items.zh: 我需要买食物因为冰箱空了。
items.answer: I need to buy food because the fridge is empty.

items.zh: 我希望能见到你因为我好想你。
items.answer: I hope to see you because I miss you so much.

items.zh: 他拒绝回答因为他不想撒谎。
items.answer: He refused to answer because he didn't want to lie.

items.zh: 我决定留下来因为天气太糟糕了。
items.answer: I decided to stay because the weather was terrible.

pipeline.title: would like / hope / wish 一词多句

items.answer: I would like to book a room.
I would like to order some food.
I hope to see you again.
What do you hope to do?

pipeline.title: promise / agree / refuse 一词多句

items.answer: I promise to be on time.

pipeline.title: desire / long / hesitate 一词多句

items.answer: I long to see my family.
Please don't hesitate to contact me.

pipeline.title: 从意愿到承诺逐步扩展

levels.label: 加计划
levels.en: I want to learn Chinese. I plan to take classes next month.
levels.zh: 我想学中文。我计划下个月上课。
levels.highlight: I plan to take classes next month.

levels.label: 加承诺
levels.en: I want to learn Chinese. I plan to take classes next month. I promise to practice every day!
levels.zh: 我想学中文。计划下个月上课。我保证每天练习！
levels.highlight: I promise to practice every day!

pipeline.title: 用 Could/Would/May 表达礼貌请求
pipeline.chunk: Could you / Would you / May I

items.answer: Could you help me with this?
Would you mind opening the window?
Could you do me a favor?
Could you please open the window?

items.zh: 如果你能帮忙我会很感激。
items.answer: I'd be grateful if you could help.

items.zh: 当然可以，我很乐意帮忙。
items.answer: Certainly, I'd be happy to help.
Of course you can use it.
I wonder if you could help me.
Could you by any chance lend me a pen?

pipeline.title: Could you [verb]? — Sure/Certainly/Of course 请求与回答操练

items.answer: Could you help me? — Of course.
Could you open the door? — Certainly.
Could you wait a moment? — No problem.

items.zh: 你介意等一下吗？——一点也不。
items.answer: Would you mind waiting? — Not at all.
May I come in? — Please do.

pipeline.title: could / would / may 一词多句
pipeline.vocabMeaning: 可以(委婉)/愿意/可以(正式)

items.answer: Would you mind waiting a moment?
Would you mind if I smoke?
Would you mind my sitting here?

pipeline.title: grateful / appreciate / oblige 一词多句

items.zh: 如果你能帮忙我会很感激。
items.answer: I'd be grateful if you could help.

items.zh: 如果你能回复我真的很感激。
items.answer: I'd be really grateful if you could reply.
I'd be grateful if you could come.
I'd appreciate it if you could wait.

items.zh: 如果你能帮忙我将感激不尽。
items.answer: I'd be much obliged if you could help.
I am much obliged to you.

pipeline.title: excuse me / favor / bother 一词多句

items.answer: Excuse me, what time is it?

items.zh: 打扰一下，这是去车站的路吗？
items.answer: Excuse me, is this the way to the station?

patterns.chunk: Could you do me a favor?

items.answer: Could you do me a favor?
Do me a favor — give this to him.
You did me a big favor.

pipeline.title: 从请求到感谢逐步扩展

levels.label: 加原因
levels.en: Could you help me? I can't carry this by myself.
levels.zh: 你能帮我吗？我自己拿不动。
levels.highlight: I can't carry this by myself.

levels.label: 加感谢
levels.en: Could you help me? I can't carry this by myself. I'd be so grateful!
levels.zh: 你能帮我吗？我自己拿不动。我会非常感激的！

pipeline.title: 用 Would you like / Do you want / How about 表达邀请
pipeline.chunk: Would you like / Do you want / How about

items.answer: Would you like to join us?

items.zh: 我很乐意接受你的邀请。
items.answer: I'd love to accept your invitation.
I'm sorry, but I have to decline.
Can I take a rain check?
Do you want to hang out later?
You should come along with us.
Let's be spontaneous and go on a trip!

pipeline.title: Would you like to [verb]? — I'd love to / I'm afraid not 邀请问答操练

items.zh: 你想加入我们吗？——我很乐意。
items.answer: Would you like to join us? — I'd love to.

items.zh: 你想喝杯咖啡吗？——好的，谢谢。
items.answer: Would you like some coffee? — Yes, please.

items.zh: 你想去散步吗？——恐怕不行。
items.answer: Would you like to go for a walk? — I'm afraid not.

items.zh: 你想出去吃吗？——听起来很棒！
items.answer: Would you like to eat out? — That sounds great!
Can we do it another time? — Sure, another time.

pipeline.title: invite / join / welcome 一词多句

items.answer: I'd like to invite you to dinner.
Would you like to join us?

pipeline.title: treat / hang out / come along 一词多句

items.answer: Let me pay — it's my treat.
No, it's on me this time.

patterns.chunk: Do you want to hang out ___?

items.answer: Do you want to hang out later?
Do you hang out with friends?
You should come along with us.
Would you like to come along?

pipeline.title: decline / another time / rain check 一词多句

patterns.chunk: I'm sorry, but I have to decline.

items.answer: I'm sorry, but I have to decline.

patterns.chunk: Can I take a rain check?

items.answer: Can I take a rain check?

pipeline.title: 从邀请到回应逐步扩展

levels.label: 邀请
levels.en: Would you like to join us for dinner?
levels.zh: 你想和我们一起吃晚饭吗？

levels.label: 加接受
levels.en: Would you like to join us for dinner? — I'd love to! It's been so long.
levels.zh: 你想和我们吃晚饭吗？——我很乐意！好久不见了。
levels.highlight: I'd love to! It's been so long.

levels.label: 加请客
levels.en: Would you like to join us for dinner? — I'd love to! It's my treat this time.
levels.zh: 你想和我们吃晚饭吗？——我很乐意！这次我请客。

pipeline.title: 用 have been / have done / ever / never 表达经历
pipeline.chunk: have been / have done / ever / never

items.answer: I have been to Beijing twice.
Have you ever tried sushi? — Yes, I have.
I have never seen a ghost.

items.zh: 完成比赛是很大的成就。
items.answer: Finishing the race was a great achievement.

items.zh: 去巴黎在我的梦想清单上。
items.answer: Visiting Paris is on my bucket list.
I have been there several times.

items.zh: 到目前为止我去过5个国家。
items.answer: So far, I have visited 5 countries.

items.zh: 你最近看过什么好电影吗？
items.answer: Have you seen any good movies lately?

pipeline.title: Have you ever [past-participle]? — Yes, I have / No, I haven't 经历问答操练

items.answer: Have you ever tried sushi? — Yes, I have.
Have you ever been abroad? — No, I haven't.
Have you ever seen snow? — Yes, once.
Have you ever ridden a horse? — Never.

items.zh: 你去过伦敦吗？——去过两次。
items.answer: Have you ever been to London? — Yes, twice.

pipeline.title: ever / never / once / several times 一词多句

items.answer: I have never seen a ghost.
I have been there several times.
I have tried it several times.
I have seen this several times.

pipeline.title: abroad / overseas / so far 一词多句
pipeline.vocabMeaning: 在国外/海外/到目前为止

items.zh: 到目前为止我去过5个国家。
items.answer: So far, I have visited 5 countries.

items.zh: 到目前为止你学到了什么？
items.answer: What have you learned so far?

pipeline.title: bucket list / achievement / milestone 一词多句

items.zh: 去巴黎在我的梦想清单上。
items.answer: Visiting Paris is on my bucket list.

items.zh: 你的梦想清单上有什么？
我已经从清单上划掉好几项了。
items.answer: I've crossed off several items from my bucket list.

items.zh: 完成比赛是很大的成就。
items.answer: Finishing the race was a great achievement.

items.zh: 毕业是我的一个重要里程碑。
items.answer: Graduation was a big milestone for me.

items.zh: 这是公司的一个重要里程碑。
items.answer: This is an important milestone for the company.

items.zh: 你下一个里程碑是什么？

pipeline.title: 从经历到成就逐步扩展

levels.label: 加次数
levels.en: I have been to Beijing twice. I have also visited Shanghai.
levels.zh: 我去过北京两次。还去过上海。

levels.label: 加成就
levels.en: I have been to Beijing twice and visited Shanghai. So far, I have visited 5 cities — that's an achievement for me!
levels.zh: 我去过北京两次、去过上海。目前去过5个城市——对我来说是个成就！
levels.highlight: So far, I have visited 5 cities — that's an achievement!

pipeline.title: 用 for/since/already/yet/just 表达持续时间
pipeline.chunkMeaning: 持续/自从/已经/还没/刚刚

items.answer: He has lived here for 10 years.
I have already finished my homework.
I have lived here for 3 years.
So far, everything has been good.

items.zh: 到现在为止我从未迟到过。
items.answer: Up to now, I have never been late.
I have wanted this all my life.
She has worked here for a decade.
It has been my lifelong dream.

pipeline.title: I have [verb] for/since [time] 持续时间操练

items.zh: 我已经等了两个小时了。
items.answer: I have waited for two hours.
I have lived here for three years.
We have been friends since childhood.

pipeline.title: for / since 一词多句
pipeline.vocabMeaning: 持续(时间段)/自从(时间点)

items.answer: I have lived here for 3 years.
I have waited for two hours.
I have known her for ten years.

items.zh: 从周一开始就没见到他。
items.answer: I haven't seen him since Monday.
I have loved music since I was a child.

items.zh: for后面是时间段，since后面是时间点。
items.answer: Use for with a duration, since with a point in time.
I have studied English for 3 years.

pipeline.title: already / yet / just 一词多句
all my life / decade / lifelong 一词多句

items.answer: I have wanted this all my life.
I have lived here all my life.
This is the best of all my life.
She has worked here for a decade.
I have studied English for a decade.
A decade is a long time.
It has been my lifelong dream.

items.zh: 学习是一个持续的过程。

pipeline.title: 从持续到总结逐步扩展

levels.label: 说持续
levels.en: I have lived here for 3 years.

levels.label: 加起点
levels.en: I have lived here for 3 years. I moved here in 2021.
levels.zh: 我在这里住了3年了。我是2021年搬来的。

levels.label: 加感受
levels.en: I have lived here for 3 years since 2021. I have really enjoyed it — it has been a wonderful experience so far.
levels.zh: 我从2021年起在这里住了3年。我真的很享受——目前为止是很棒的经历。
levels.highlight: it has been a wonderful experience so far.
